workspacesweb.ipaccesssettings.CfnAbout: This resource specifies IP access settings that can be associated with a web portal. For more information, see [Set up IP access controls (optional)](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/workspaces-web/latest/adminguide/ip-access-controls.html).

workspacesweb.ipaccesssettings.Additiona.Description: Additional encryption context of the IP access settings.

workspacesweb.ipaccesssettings.CustomerM.Description: The custom managed key of the IP access settings.

workspacesweb.ipaccesssettings.Descripti.Description: The description of the IP access settings.

workspacesweb.ipaccesssettings.DisplayNa.Description: The display name of the IP access settings.

workspacesweb.ipaccesssettings.IpRules.Description: The IP rules of the IP access settings.

workspacesweb.ipaccesssettings.Tags.Description: The tags to add to the browser settings resource. A tag is a key-value pair.
